---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new doc, template, pattern, or rule
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What's missing or weak
What would the skill do better with this addition?

## Proposed change
- [ ] New framework doc (`docs/frameworks/...`)
- [ ] New template (`templates/...`)
- [ ] New architecture pattern (`patterns/...`)
- [ ] New checklist (`checklists/...`)
- [ ] Update to the agent brain (`SKILL.md` and the 25+ identical rule files)
- [ ] Other:

## Why now
What prompted this? A real project hit a wall? A new Apple framework shipped? An agent gave bad output?

## Sketch
If you have a draft outline, paste it here. Otherwise just describe the shape of it.

## Willing to PR?
- [ ] Yes, I'll open a PR
- [ ] No, I'd like a maintainer to pick this up
